overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a dimly lit, moody bedroom interior with cyberpunk aesthetics. The camera remains completely stationary throughout, capturing the unmade bed, checkered wall patterns, and a view of a rainy neon-lit city through the window.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with city view

agents.ego_description: lying stationary on the bed in a fixed position observing the room

entered.detail: messy bed with white and grey sheets occupying the immediate foreground
wall with distinctive black and white checkered pattern behind furniture
rectangular overhead window emitting soft greenish ambient light
large floor-to-ceiling glass window revealing exterior cityscape
distant blurred city lights visible through window in green and blue neon hues
small glowing appliance or space heater near the window wall
modern white couch positioned against the checkered wall

segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a cyberpunk-style bedroom interior from a video game. The unmade bed occupies the foreground while a distinctive checkered wall and white sofa sit to the left. Through the large window on the right, the distant glow of a neon-lit city is visible through the foggy night. No movement or changes occur throughout the entire clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a completely static perspective of a moody, cyberpunk-style bedroom interior that remains frozen in a state of atmospheric stillness. It begins with a focused view of an unmade bed in the foreground, framed by a distinctive checkered wall and a white sofa to the left. As the gaze lingers, the composition draws attention toward the large window on the right, where the distant glow of a neon-lit city pierces through the foggy night. The scene persists in this unwavering state, with the dim interior lighting and the rainy urban backdrop remaining constant and undisturbed.
